title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally.
highlights: pull and run Llama-3, Mistral, Gemma, Phi-3

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, list, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, stream, and embed via Ollama’s REST endpoints.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLMs and embedders inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama—import chatGPT-style UI, RAG, multimodal, user auth, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with async, streaming, and embeddings support; Maven Central artifact.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST API; chat, stream, pull, and list models from Ruby apps.

title: ollama-cli (go)
summary: Community Go CLI adding batch prompt files, conversation history, and model benchmarking to Ollama.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement; VS Code extension + language-server backend.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder for building RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: FastAPI chatbot, Next.js UI, RAG with Chroma, function-calling examples, and more.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official multi-arch Docker images (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama server in containers.

title: ollama-grpc
summary: Lightweight gRPC proxy in front of Ollama REST API for high-throughput services written in Go.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot that ingests PDFs into Chroma vectorDB and answers questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models through slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt bot that threads replies using Ollama models; supports code syntax highlighting and streaming.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds “Ask Ollama” command to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, or rewrite text.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package and NixOS module for reproducible Ollama deployments with automatic GPU driver setup.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama REST API; chat, stream, embeddings, and model management via Tokio.
